transcript.text:
[Defying gravity] It's not falling out
Food is free if it drops
That's amazing
[Oops...]
[Showing off its pretty colors]
[10 plates of Mungtigi (fresh steak tartare)]
[All that by yourself?]
[Does she really eat all of that?]
[Don't you worry, ma'am]
[Happy tastebud dance]
[Stack them high!]
I can't recall eating all of this
[That's spectacular...]
[Where are we at today?]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Jamsil today

There's an apartment here called 'Rose Apartment'
There are so many gems here in the plaza
I had a great steak tartare meal at Daegu before
And I've been told there's also a good one here in Seoul
They get their fresh meat every morning from the countryside
And it's only served after 5pm
I'm excited
Let's go downstairs
It already looks like a hidden gem
[Rose A Plaza]
[Han Mungtigi] [Seoul, Songpa-gu]
There it is
[The owner]
[OMG it's Tzuyang]
Our employees know you well
Do you have steak tartare today?

Yes, they just arrived
-10 plates? -Yes, 10
That's a little too much for 1 person
Can you do it?
[Let's do it!]
[Fresh steak tartare (raw beef) in Seoul]
[10 plates ready to go]
This is a first...
It's too much for her
-My mother made this beef/radish soup -Wow, thank you
These riceballs go well with the beef
Thank you
[10 plates being served]
That's impossible to eat alone
It's been a while
I haven't had it since that last Daegu mukbang

They didn't have these in Seoul
It won't fall out from the dish
Flip it over completely
Food is free if it drops
Even like this?
[Defying gravity]
[Not a chance]
Even if I shake it?
It's totally stuck
[Awkward]
I was shaking it
Bon appetit
Special sauce
Fresh steak tartare that came all the way to Seoul
Dip it
Wait, its real flavors Without anything first

[I'm lovin' it]
Can you hear the sound?
Mungtigi steak tartare (Cut and served on the same day)
The texture of the meat is great because it's so fresh
Delicious
So chewy that it's almost crunchy
Mungtigi has its own consistency that you can't get from any other meat
The texture is amazing
1 plate almost gone already?
They gave me some soup
[Beef/radish soup]
This is great too
[A 5 layer tower]
Eating 5 pieces at once
That's really good
This

Some mushrooms to go with it
[Dip in sesame oil with salt]
Tasty
These are raw mushrooms
Its scent goes really well with steak tartare
The textures complement each other
Right, the riceballs!
With some of their sauce
Why do I keep blowing on it?
Tasty meat makes everything good
Get a bunch of them
[Calm down everyone!]
In 1 bite
1 plate down
Where did it go?
I'm shocked

I've never seen anything like this before
Another mouthful
Get 1 more piece
It got cooked a little bit
I personally like aged beef
But it can't beat fresh steak tartare like this
Mungtigi tower
[World's highest mungtigi tower]
That's amazing
How can anyone stop after 1 plate?
[How can you eat 10 plates?]
[Steak tartare sushi]
This is it
Dipping the sushi in soy sauce makes it taste 10 times better
Sushi=soy sauce
In soy sauce

This calls for some soju
Mushrooms
The sushi is the best
It goes so well with wasabi
I love eating a big mouthful of it
It feels better to eat like that Truly amazing
Who eats mungtigi like this?
These are supposed to be eaten in a bunch, right? (pun joke)
It's only been like 10 minutes
Can she finish it?
I watched her yellowtail mukbang and I was so shocked
I was like "Who is she?!"
It's really nice to see her here in our restaurant
I'm not stacking them on purpose
Wait, I am
Eating them 1 by 1 is good too

But I love eating a mouthful of it
You can really feel the chewiness if you eat them by piece
Sushi
Chewy (jelly-like)
Tastes good with soy sauce
The sauce is sweet and tasty
I'm just eating now Not sick of the same taste
You can just tell by the color that the quality is good
I do a little dance when the food is good
Almost like a conductor
There were a few times I did a little too much And it had to be edited out
For tuna mukbang
I just kept doing this
That's when I used to edit my own videos
I just could not let it happen
[Okay, now we know why...]

[Let's not do that again]
They call my expressions "the eyebrows of truth"
But I think it's the hands
I do this if it's really good
[Hand gestures of truth]
That's incredible
I was worried she wouldn't be able to finish it
I thought her mukbangs were edited
But it's not I'm shocked to see it in person
And she makes everything look so delicious
[Hands of truth going for more]
It's so fresh that it doesn't have any gamey taste
[With some warm beef/radish soup]
Soy sauce
I think it tastes best with soy sauce
It's a sweet soy sauce

Delicious
I've been saving these It's so good
[If you keep doing that...]
[It'll come back...]
PD: I think you're eating too fast
[But it's so good]
I wonder why these are dark red
Steak tartare is bright red
But mungtigi is dark red
Where did it all go?
This has happened to me before
[Dejavu] Where did everything go? Who ate it?
With lots of soy sauce
I love raw food
Raw fish and raw beef are so tasty
[Everything's tasty except vegetables, right?]

I wanna try grilling one
I wonder if it's going to be good
I can't recall eating all of this
Amazing That's really amazing
And she's really pretty
The pieces stick together, so it's a lot more than you think
What an honor to witness this
Absolutely remarkable
It can take up to 20 people to finish 10 plates of that
[In disbelief]
[And it hasn't even been an hour]
I need to make sushi
[Never 1 piece at a time]
[Bring it back]
Steak tartare sushi is legendary
I'll eat this last

[Grab the last pieces]
Dip in soy sauce
To make the best sushi
1 last bite
[A perfect finale]
[Shy]
[2 thumbs up]
It's a lot more food than it looks
[That was the best]
I showed her the yellowtail mukbang And she still refused to believe it
[It's impossible]
Now she believes it after seeing it in person
I didn't think it was possible
Thanks everyone
[Bring it back 1 last time] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
